List of [subprocessors](https://cluely.com/subprocessors)."},{"title":"Settings - Cluely Guide","url":"https://docs.cluely.com/feature/settings","snippet":"* Logout and Quit Cluely buttons at the bottom. * Logout (also in the avatar menu). # Settings. Configure Cluely’s settings, keyboard shortcuts, and customize your AI assistant experience. At the top you’ll see keyboard shortcuts, plus:. * **Meeting audio language** — language spoken in your meetings (used for Listen-mode transcription). * **Change display** — choose which monitor Cluely appears on (you can also drag the command bar to another monitor). Click the Home icon (to the right of Hide) to open the in-app Dashboard. In the top-right avatar menu you’ll find: Customize Cluely, Help Center, Billing, Settings, and Logout. ### ​ Customize Cluely. Customize Cluely’s knowledge with Customize Cluely. You can edit your keybinds or disable the shortcuts entirely by going to your **Settings** > **Selecting a Shortcut** > **Edit Icon**. ## ​ Language Settings. Choose the language Cluely uses for:. Set the language spoken in your meetings for:. Customize your keyboard shortcuts to match your workflow."},{"title":"Cluely App Review: The new AI Revolution?","url":"https://medium.com/@theo-james/cluely-app-review-the-new-ai-revolution-2889db36838a","snippet":"# Cluely App Review: The new AI Revolution? Cluely is one of the latest to enter this territory: an AI assistant that sits in your meetings, watches the screen, listens to the call, and delivers real-time coaching to make you perform better. It’s solving a real tension — we want to show up sharper without spending more time prepping. But here’s the thing: as someone who’s been building software for years, and obsessively experimenting with PKM systems by night, I don’t just ask what a tool _does_. So let’s look closely — not just at the features, but at the mental model Cluely promotes, and the kind of thinking it nudges us toward. Image 4: An AI app for 'cheating' just dropped. What if it could nudge you to phrase something better, slow down, ask smarter questions, and track how much you’re talking? *   **Private Delivery**: Only you see the prompts — it’s a personal assistant, not a group feature. But it’s what’s underneath that matters."},{"title":"Cluely page - SaaS Landing Page","url":"https://saaslandingpage.com/cluely","snippet":"# Saaslandingpage. # Cluely. Cluely is a real-time AI assistant that operates discreetly on your desktop during virtual interactions like meetings, sales calls, and interviews. It passively listens to what’s happening and provides intelligent answers, follow-up prompts, web research, and summaries exactly when you need them. ### Post navigation. ### Inspiration. ### Templates. ### Resources. ### Popular stacks. ### Popular fonts."},{"title":"Cluely Review 2026: Pros, Cons, Pricing & Verdict | Efficient App","url":"https://efficient.app/apps/cluely","snippet":"Cluely is just another AI chat wrapper as many others. The main differentiation is its ability to persist across calls and actively listen, while supplying"}],"blocked":false}
